/usr/bin/ar qc libAPI.a CMakeFiles/API.dir/DomainSampler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/API.dir/Hybrid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/API.dir/MSBase.cpp.o CMakeFiles/API.dir/MSGrid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/API.dir/MSRelaxation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/API.dir/MergeHubbard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/API.dir/REBase.cpp.o CMakeFiles/API.dir/REDiscard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/API.dir/RELargest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/API.dir/RELargestLM.cpp.o CMakeFiles/API.dir/REMaxElim.cpp.o CMakeFiles/API.dir/RESelect.cpp.o CMakeFiles/API.dir/SEConvex.cpp.o CMakeFiles/API.dir/SEPoint.cpp.o CMakeFiles/API.dir/SESphPt.cpp.o CMakeFiles/API.dir/SFBase.cpp.o CMakeFiles/API.dir/SFMinErr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/API.dir/SFRitter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/API.dir/SFWhite.cpp.o CMakeFiles/API.dir/SOBalance.cpp.o CMakeFiles/API.dir/SOBase.cpp.o CMakeFiles/API.dir/SOPerSphere.cpp.o CMakeFiles/API.dir/SOSimplex.cpp.o CMakeFiles/API.dir/SRBurst.cpp.o CMakeFiles/API.dir/SRComposite.cpp.o CMakeFiles/API.dir/SRExpand.cpp.o CMakeFiles/API.dir/SRGrid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/API.dir/SRMerge.cpp.o CMakeFiles/API.dir/SRQuickBurst.cpp.o CMakeFiles/API.dir/SRSpawn.cpp.o CMakeFiles/API.dir/SRStandOff.cpp.o CMakeFiles/API.dir/SRVoronoi.cpp.o CMakeFiles/API.dir/SSIsohedron.cpp.o CMakeFiles/API.dir/SSRings.cpp.o CMakeFiles/API.dir/STGGeneric.cpp.o CMakeFiles/API.dir/STGHubbard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/API.dir/STGOctree.cpp.o CMakeFiles/API.dir/SurfaceDiv.cpp.o CMakeFiles/API.dir/VFAdaptive.cpp.o CMakeFiles/API.dir/VFGapCross.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libAPI.a
